title: Monday V2 API - tags mutation
excerpt:
Hey, 
I’m using Monday V2 API for some internal automations, I’m modifying a tag through the API (after creating it) but I see the tag itself in the board only after refreshing or going through boards, it doesn’t work in…

posts.author: slob (Shai Slobodov)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

I’m using Monday V2 API for some internal automations, I’m modifying a tag through the API (after creating it) but I see the tag itself in the board only after refreshing or going through boards, it doesn’t work instantly like the other column types.
Did anyone else experienced something similar? I doubt that it’s this way by design .

Thanks.

posts.author: Scott-monday.com (Scott Underwood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @slob

Just to confirm my understanding - you’re able to mutate the tag successfully via API, but you need to actively refresh your board in order for the change to be visible?

Is this an issue that you’re still experiencing? What browser(s) are you using?

I’d love to gain just a little bit more information for feedback purposes

-Scott
